message:
chore: remove low-quality duplicate testimonials

Removed 17 generic/short testimonials from duplicate authors:
- "having a personal agent is incredible" (bffmike)
- "use @clawdbot", "@clawdbot is crazy" (victorpaycro, BLUECOW009)
- "yeah i think you want @clawdbot" (alex_here_now duplicate)
- "Clawdbot is goated :)" (SaidAitmbarek duplicate)
- "Agentic is now..." (mindragon), "JOIN THE CLAWDBOT NATION TODAY!"
- "The future of development everyone" (mindragon)
- "welcome to the club..." (xMikeMickelson duplicate)
- "set up @clawdbot and never look back" (thekitze duplicate)
- "HOOKED", "IT IS TIME" (too short)
- "You should look at @clawdbot" x2 (generic recommendations)
- "This is sick" (onusoz duplicate)
- "🫧🦞 in claws we trust" (just emojis)
- "Clawdbot is a super AI assistant..." (oddly phrased)
- Generic community enthusiasm messages

Kept strong, specific testimonials from each author.
